accounts.name: client
docs: The guest — must be the one who made the booking.

accounts.name: escrow_token_account
docs: Escrow token account holding the booking payment.

accounts.name: host_token_account
docs: Host's USDC token account — receives (total_price - fee).

accounts.name: platform_vault_token_account
docs: Platform vault token account — receives the fee.

accounts.name: guest
docs: We don't want to pass lamports to the host because it didn't create the booking
The guest has the responsability to send the money from the PDA to its wallet until I find a way to avoit
adding many accounts in this instruction

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Token account controlled by treasury_pda. Holds user guarantee deposits.

accounts.name: platform_vault_token_account
docs: Token account controlled by platform_vault_pda. Holds platform fees.

accounts.name: gateway_token
docs: When Civic is live, this account will be validated against the
user's wallet using the civic-gateway program CPI.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account — source of the withdrawal.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: Destination: the user's own USDC token account.

errors.name: UnauthorizedUser
errors.msg: Only the user can modify their profile

errors.name: UserBanned
errors.msg: User is banned

errors.name: UserNotVerified
errors.msg: User is not verified

errors.name: UserNotHost
errors.msg: User is not a host

errors.name: InsufficientDeposit
errors.msg: User does not have enough deposit to perform this action

errors.name: PropertyInActiveBooking
errors.msg: Property is currently in an active booking and cannot be modified

errors.name: UnauthorizedHost
errors.msg: Only the host can modify their property

errors.name: NoPropertiesToModify
errors.msg: No properties to modify

errors.name: UnauthorizedBooking
errors.msg: Only the client can make a booking for themselves

errors.name: InvalidBookingStatus
errors.msg: Invalid booking status for this action

errors.name: InvalidBookingDates
errors.msg: Invalid booking dates: check-in must be before check-out

errors.name: DatesAlreadyBooked
errors.msg: Dates already booked for this property

errors.name: DatesUnbooked
errors.msg: Dates unbooked this property

errors.name: InvalidBookingDaysAccount
errors.msg: Invalid booking days account for the given dates

errors.name: HostCannotBookOwnProperty
errors.msg: Host cannot book their own property

errors.name: InvalidHost
errors.msg: Invalid host for this property

errors.name: InvalidMonth
errors.msg: Invalid month

errors.name: UnitializedBookingDays
errors.msg: Unitialized booking days accounts

errors.name: InvalidBookingProperty
errors.msg: Invalid booking property

errors.name: TooEarlyToActivate
errors.msg: Too early to activate booking. Minimun 1 day left

errors.name: WrongGuessPassed
errors.msg: Wrong guess passed

errors.name: DisputeNotFound
errors.msg: Dispute not found

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized admin action

errors.name: ConfigAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Configuration already initialized

errors.name: MaxAdminsReached
errors.msg: Max admins reached

errors.name: CannotRemoveSelf
errors.msg: Cannot remove self from admins

errors.name: AtLeastOneAdminRequired
errors.msg: At least one admin is required

errors.name: AdminNotFound
errors.msg: Admin to remove not found

errors.name: DepositTooLow
errors.msg: Deposit amount is below the minimum required

errors.name: InvalidTreasuryAccount
errors.msg: The treasury account is not the expected one

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: The token mint does not match the configured USDC mint

errors.name: WithdrawWithActiveBooking
errors.msg: User has an active booking and cannot withdraw their guarantee

errors.name: InsufficientDepositBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient guarantee balance to withdraw the requested amount

errors.name: BookingNotActive
errors.msg: Booking must be in Active status to complete the stay

errors.name: AlreadyVerified

errors.name: NotAPartyToBooking
errors.msg: Caller is not a party to this booking

errors.name: BookingNotInDispute
errors.msg: Booking must be in Disputed status to resolve

errors.name: InvalidScore
errors.msg: Invalid score. Must be between 1 and 5

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount

types.name: DisputeReason
docs: General category of a dispute — kept on-chain as a permanent record.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Platform fee charged per completed booking, in basis points (e.g. 500 = 5%).
